post.title: Playing Around with Eleventy
post.description: Taking a stab at another static site generator.  Eleventy (11ty) was a refreshingly simple SSG that was up and running in a couple days.
post.excerpt: So I've been toying with the idea of creating a web app for an NFL pool that I'm in. The guy that runs the pool is fantastic, but he's…
